description: Outlaw motorcycle club founded in Eugene, Oregon in 1969. Has chapters in Oregon, Washington, Germany, and Australia. Its center patch features an ankh over a motorcycle wheel on handlebars, with blue and white colors.

country_links.evidence_quote: Chapters exist in Oregon, Washington, Germany and Australia.
country_links.context: The Free Souls Motorcycle Club has a chapter in Australia.
